opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: Ruined couch → showroom sofa for $47 (pet hair gone in 60 sec)
opportunities.before_state: Faded, scratched, pet-hair-covered sectional that embarrasses guests
opportunities.after_state: Sleek, clean, wrinkle-free sofa that looks brand new with zero pet hair visible
opportunities.why_now: Spring 2026 pet-proofing content is peaking as people host more gatherings post-winter and search 'couch cover' spikes every April–May.

opportunities.specific_product: 2-tier expandable under-sink cabinet organizer with pull-out drawer
opportunities.transformation_hook: Chaotic bathroom cabinet → spa-level storage for $28
opportunities.before_state: Products falling over, cleaning supplies piled randomly, wasted vertical space under bathroom or kitchen sink
opportunities.after_state: Every bottle upright, categorized, and reachable in seconds with tiered pull-out access
opportunities.why_now: Spring cleaning searches are at annual peak in early May and under-sink chaos is the #1 relatable bathroom problem shown across organization TikTok and Reels.

opportunities.specific_product: Best Choice Products faux leather storage ottoman bench with tray
opportunities.transformation_hook: Cluttered bedroom corner → styled storage bench for $79
opportunities.before_state: Bedroom entryway or foot-of-bed with clothes piled on floor or a worn-out chair
opportunities.after_state: Clean, styled bench doubling as hidden blanket/shoe storage with matching room aesthetic
opportunities.why_now: Spring bedroom refresh content drives consistent May buying spikes and the dual function (seating + hidden storage) has high shareability for before/after Reels.

opportunities.specific_product: Syruvia 25-piece silicone kitchen utensil set with holder
opportunities.transformation_hook: Mismatched junk drawer tools → matching kitchen set for $39
opportunities.before_state: Scratched nonstick pans, mismatched plastic and metal utensils crammed in a broken holder
opportunities.after_state: Color-coordinated silicone set displayed in an upright holder, kitchen counter looking intentional and clean
opportunities.why_now: Home cooking content remains high engagement in spring and Syruvia's 20% commission makes a low-ticket item meaningfully profitable at volume.

opportunities.specific_product: Eli & Elm adjustable side sleeper pillow with cutout design
opportunities.transformation_hook: Waking up with neck pain → pain-free mornings for $89
opportunities.before_state: Flat, lumpy old pillow causing neck stiffness and interrupted sleep every night
opportunities.after_state: Contoured support that keeps spine aligned all night, waking up refreshed with zero neck strain
buyer_intent_keywords: pillow for side sleepers neck pain
opportunities.why_now: Sleep health content sustains year-round buyer intent and Eli & Elm's 20% commission on an $89 product delivers the highest per-unit affiliate payout in this list.
